name: Gantenbainne Mosqueda
alt_names: ガンテンバイン・モスケーダ
description: 107th Arrancar in Sōsuke Aizen's army. He wears an afro-style haircut with thick sideburns and a goatee. His outfit has been modified to match his particular style, including large frills on his collar and thighs. The remains of his Hollow mask are a sunglasses-shaped plate on his forehead with four teeth coming out above each eye. There is a star in the center of the mask fragment, which allows Gantenbainne to see when he pulls the plate down over his eyes.     His personality is in contrast to the other Privaron Espada. While fighting Yasutora Sado he showed restraint and went easy on Chad while the others fought intensely with their respective opponents. He didn't go all out until he was actually hit. He also warned Chad of an approaching Nnoitra Jiruga.
